title: Easy-Golden-Apples by HexaFoxx
description: Easy golden apples, changes the recipe from the old boring recipe to a new one, easier crafting, less grinding, more fighting.
body:
Easy Golden Apples makes crafting golden apples more accessible and less expensive while keeping them balanced for survival gameplay.

Instead of using 8 gold ingots, this plugin introduces a more practical recipe using 4 gold ingots arranged around an apple. This makes golden apples easier to obtain without removing their value as a strong food item.
